case_title: MARY ANN HATLAN VS. JOHN RICHARD STOCKDALE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF MARY ANN HATLAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN RICHARD STOCKDALE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT PARITES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,844.97 FILED BY HATLAN, MARY ANN AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, JOHN RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED JUL-07-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, JOHN RICHARD
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
PLAINTIFF EXIBIT RECEIVED VIA MAIL. NO REQUEST FOR ZOOM.
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
